base.drop_desc: Drop Paracci session file or attachments to load automatically.
base.drop_unsupported_desc: This file cannot be dropped in the current view.

hybrid_kem_legacy_session: This session was created with an older version of Paracci and does not have post-quantum protection. Please ask your contact to start a new session.
hybrid_kem_init_failed: Post-quantum key generation failed. Please try again.
hybrid_kem_respond_failed: Post-quantum key encapsulation failed. Please try again.
hybrid_kem_complete_failed: Post-quantum key decapsulation failed. Please try again.

armor.report_info: This report measures your device's high-cost Argon2id key-derivation performance. This increases offline brute-force resistance but does NOT guarantee absolute cryptographic protection.

index.title: sessions
index.subtitle: encrypted · offline · traceless messaging
index.empty_desc: Start by creating a new file-exchange session.

auth.setup_2fa_desc: Add an extra layer of security to your passphrase using an app like Google Authenticator.
auth.verify_2fa_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
auth.dpapi_different_account: This profile was created on a different Windows account and cannot be opened here.
auth.dpapi_keyfile_damaged: Device binding verification failed. The local key file may be damaged.
auth.keychain_missing: This profile's device binding could not be found in the macOS Keychain. The profile may have been created on a different Mac.
auth.keychain_failed: Keychain access failed. Ensure Paracci is allowed in System Settings → Privacy & Security.
auth.secret_service_unavailable: No keyring daemon is running. Install and unlock GNOME Keyring or KWallet to enable device binding. Falling back to passphrase-only mode.
auth.secret_service_missing: This profile's device binding could not be found in the system keyring.
auth.secret_service_failed: System keyring access failed. Unlock the keyring and try again.

unlock.init_desc: Set a strong passphrase to protect your database.
unlock.init_hint: Use at least 12 characters with enough entropy and no obvious patterns.
unlock.unlock_desc: Enter your device passphrase to continue.
unlock.req_entropy: At least 64 bits of estimated entropy
unlock.req_patterns: No repeated, common, or sequential patterns
unlock.passphrase_title: Use a strong passphrase, up to 128 characters.
unlock.lockout_message: Unlock is temporarily locked. Try again in
unlock.security_note_before: Your passphrase is processed with the
unlock.security_note_after: algorithm to derive your device key. The key is never stored in plaintext on disk.
unlock.setup_2fa_desc: Add an extra layer of security to your passphrase using an app like Google Authenticator.
unlock.verify_2fa_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.

settings.updates_desc: Check for application updates and review release history.
settings.title: settings
settings.subtitle: Manage application preferences and security configuration.
settings.profile_desc: Customize your local identity and appearance.
settings.security_desc: Layers of protection against unauthorized access.
settings.anti_screenshot_desc: Best-effort OS controls reduce capture exposure, but cannot block every screenshot, recording, or screen-share path.
settings.quiet_mode_desc: Does not ask for confirmation when closing a message; Paracci drops visible message state and short-lived caches.
settings.2fa_desc: Ask for an extra security code during login.
settings.auto_cleanup_desc: Downloaded .paracci files are removed from the downloads folder after this period when cleanup runs.
settings.session_defaults_desc: Default behavior for newly created sessions.
settings.default_ttl_desc: New sessions automatically close after this period. Infinite is not recommended for security.
settings.sys_info_desc: Application data directories and configuration paths.

setup.step2: Send the setup file to Y. It contains authenticated public metadata, not confidential message content.
setup.step3_p1: Import the responder file sent by Y
setup.label: Session name
setup.ttl_hint: Session will be completely closed after this period.
setup.standard_desc: Fast and secure. Ideal for low-end hardware.
setup.custom_desc: Custom parameters. Build your own armor.
setup.seal_info_desc_p1: These settings are written into the authenticated Initiator setup metadata. They
setup.hw_advice_desc_p1: Based on local tests, this profile will take approximately
setup.security_hint: This setting determines message decryption speed and brute-force resistance.
setup.color_hint: Select a color for this session or enter a custom hex code.
setup.title: New Session
setup.subtitle: Start by creating a new file-exchange session.
setup.hw_report_error: An error occurred while fetching the report.
setup.initiator_desc: You are importing the first file created by X. Your session is created, responder file downloads automatically.
setup.responder_desc: You are importing the response file sent by Y. Your session activates and bonding starts.
setup.file_hint: Click to select or drag file
setup.import_hint: Enter a name if importing an Initiator file. Can be left empty for Responder.
setup.import_initiator_subtitle: Join a session by uploading the Initiator file. It contains authenticated public metadata, not confidential message content.
setup.error_responder_redirect: This is a Responder (reply) file. Please upload it inside the relevant session page.
setup.maximum_desc: High-cost Argon2id key derivation. Increases offline brute-force resistance. Does NOT guarantee absolute cryptographic protection. Roadmap: Hybrid KEM (ML-KEM/Kyber) integration is planned for a future release.

session.import_invalid: Not a Paracci file or file is corrupt.
session.role_error: You already started this session as X. Cannot import as Y.
session.y_init_success: Session established. Downloading Responder file — send this to X.
session.file_activation_no_match: This message file does not match any session on this device.
session.error_session_not_found_id: No session found for this responder file. (ID: {id}...)
session.error_role_mismatch: This responder file is not for you. (Current Role: {role})
session.error_x_only_responder: Only the initiator (X) can upload a responder file.
session.error_invalid_responder: Invalid file. Please select a Responder file.
session.error_mismatched_session: This file belongs to another session.
session.file_is_msg: This file might be a message file — open it from the session page.
session.bond_not_established_x: Bond not yet established. You must import the Responder file.
session.bond_not_established_y: Bond not yet established. Wait for X's first message.
session.import_responder_desc: Upload the responder file (.paracci) sent by the peer to authenticate and finalize the session. The responder file is not confidential message content.
session.export_forbidden: Export is not allowed for this session.
session.fingerprint_desc: Verify this code through another channel. It must be identical on both sides.
session.safety_code_desc: Compare this code with the other person over a separate trusted channel. Only confirm if both sides show the exact same code.
session.safety_code_input_label: I confirm that the safety code matches the one on the other party's device.
session.safety_code_mismatch: Safety code does not match. Do not use this session until both sides match.
session.safety_unverified: Safety code must be confirmed before this session can be used.
session.legacy_handshake_blocked: This session was created with an older unsigned handshake and cannot be used safely. Create a new session.
session.legacy_handshake_version: This session was established with an older version of Paracci and does not have identity binding. Please start a new session.
session.legacy_session_requires_new: This session was created without identity binding. Please ask your contact to start a new session.
session.msg_burned: opened - cannot reopen on this device
session.label_change_hint: Label is permanent and tied to the handshake.
session.waiting_initiator_msg_desc: The Initiator (X) must send the first message to start the secure communication. Once you import the message file received from X on the side panel, you will be able to send messages.
session.clipboard_clear_failed: Clipboard could not be cleared. Replace or clear it manually now.
session.clipboard_browser_history_warning: Browser mode cannot prevent clipboard history storage. Clear operating-system clipboard history manually.
session.text_copied_notify: Text copied. Local apps may read the clipboard until it clears in 30 seconds.
session.single_use_alert: This envelope has been opened and cannot be opened again on this device. Copies of this file on other devices or storage locations are not affected by this application.
session.clipboard_failed_locked: Clipboard access failed. It might be locked by another application.
session.attachment_sanitization_failed: This image attachment could not be processed and was rejected for safety. Please try a different file.
session.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
session.package_limit_error: The message could not be opened: package size or structure limit exceeded.
session.pending_desc_x_p1: Did you send the Initiator file to Y? Activate your session by uploading the Responder file from the other peer below.
session.pending_desc_y: Responder file created. Send it to X; the session will activate on their side.
session.bond_complete_desc: The handshake is complete. You can now start messaging securely.
session.ready_desc_p1: You can now encrypt or open messages. However, ensure you have delivered your
session.ready_desc_p3: so they can start the session.
session.checklist_item1: Did you delete the Initiator/Responder files from your computer?
session.checklist_item2: Ensure you also clear these files from the recycle bin.
session.checklist_hint: These setup files are no longer needed after bonding. They contain authenticated public metadata; deleting extra copies reduces exposure and confusion but does not erase other copies.
session.seal_subtitle: After opening, this envelope cannot be opened again on that device. Other copies are not affected by this application.
session.message_placeholder: Write your message here… # Header, **Bold**, etc.
session.add_files_hint: Drag files or click to select
session.msg_ttl_hint: File becomes invalid if not opened within the specified time.
session.allow_download_hint1: If off, the other party can only view the message.
session.open_subtitle: Upload the incoming .paracci file and decrypt.
session.expired_desc: This session has expired. Messages can no longer be sent or opened.
session.close_modal_desc: This message is single-use. Closing drops Paracci-controlled state and caches, but OS/runtime copies may still exist; you won't be able to open this envelope again on this device. Copies elsewhere are not affected by this application.
session.close_modal_dont_ask: Don't ask again (Enable Fast Exit mode)

profile.title: User Profile
profile.subtitle: This information is stored on your local device and is not visible to other users.
profile.nickname_hint: Only shown on your side to identify who is using the app.

preview.not_found_title: Preview expired or file not found.
preview.not_found_desc: For security reasons, files are kept in RAM for a short time.
preview.security_warning_desc_p1: This file is in an executable format ({ext}). It may contain harmful code. Content is shown
preview.security_warning_desc_p2: for review purposes only. Do not run it on your computer.
preview.review_mode_desc_p2: Scripts are disabled for security reasons.
preview.video_not_supported: Your browser does not support video playback.
preview.cannot_preview: This file type cannot be previewed.

update.page_subtitle: Check for new releases and review recent update notes.
update.latest: You are running the latest version.
update.check_failed: Unable to check for updates right now.
update.history_failed: Unable to load update history right now.
update.protocol_warning: This update changes the session protocol. After updating, you will need to establish new sessions with your contacts.
update.protocol_unknown: This release does not provide session protocol compatibility information. After updating, you may need to establish new sessions with your contacts.
update.ready: Ready to install. The application will close.
update.error_download_failed: Could not download the update. Try again later.
update.error_checksum_missing: The release checksum entry is missing. Installation was stopped.
update.error_checksum_failed: Checksum verification failed. The downloaded installer was deleted.
update.error_size_mismatch: The downloaded file size did not match the release asset. Installation was stopped.
update.error_browser_open_failed: Could not open the releases page.
update.error_installer_missing: The verified installer is no longer available.
